reference_answer: Bench captain Omar Vale held custody of the soldering cabinet key.
DR-8 proposed lending the soldering cabinet key to any member who completed the short safety quiz.
DR-8 remained draft pending workshop board review.
The workshop board vote allowed checkout only to certified mentors during supervised repair hours.
HS-8 was noncontrolling because it copied DR-8 before board review and omitted the board vote and CF-8.
